svg.text: “Is this answer grounded & on-policy? Is this action safe & within limits?” → PASS: send / commit or queue approval · FAIL: regenerate (max 2 retries) · then escalate — runs before EVERY customer-facing message

svg.text: ① MCP-first — every capability is a tool; the same tools power web, WhatsApp, email, voice & Slack.
② Resolve, don't deflect — agents act across systems to fix the issue, not just answer it.
③ Grounded — every answer cites the knowledge base & account data; no hallucinated policy.
④ Tiered autonomy — T1 auto / T2 one-tap / T3 human; smart escalation with full context.
⑤ Model tiering + caching → low cost-per-resolution; eval-gated, regression-tested reliability.
⑥ Everything audited — and Voice-of-Customer insights feed customer1, market1 & the product.
